grades.expectation: Response mentions CQS training requirements for all conveyancing staff
grades.reason: Clearly states CQS expects role-appropriate conveyancing training and mentions bringing new fee earners into the CQS training framework

grades.expectation: Response covers protocol awareness and compliance training
grades.reason: Extensively covers CQS policies, procedures, risk compliance, AML, fraud prevention, Lender Handbook compliance, and other protocol requirements

grades.expectation: Response mentions supervision requirements for new staff
grades.reason: Explicitly states new fee earners should not work unsupervised until competent and details supervision requirements throughout

grades.expectation: Response references the need to maintain training records as CQS evidence
grades.reason: Section 6 specifically addresses keeping evidence for CQS audit/compliance purposes and mentions training records

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CQS firm-level requirements from individual SRA competence
grades.reason: Response focuses entirely on CQS requirements without distinguishing these from individual SRA competence requirements or mentioning SRA competence at all
